name: Applesauce Cake Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Beat butter in a large bowl until creamy.
3. Blend in eggs, juice, and applesauce.
4. Combine dry ingredients; gradually add to egg mixture, beating until well blended.
5. Stir in apples.
6. Spread batter evenly into a greased 8-inch square baking pan.
7. Bake 20-25 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Cool on a wire rack.
9. Cut into squares.
10. Serve warm or at room temperature, with Creamy Topping if desired.
Creamy Topping:
1. Beat cream in a small bowl at high speed of an electric mixer until soft peaks form.
2. Beat in vanilla and cinnamon until stiff peaks form.
